title: Individual Tax Statistics by Area (ITSA) - Canada.ca
content:
## Individual Tax Statistics by Area (ITSA)
The Individual Tax Statistics by Area (ITSA) tables present personal income tax data based on geographic area, including: Forward Sortation Area (FSA), census division, census subdivision, census metropolitan area, census agglomeration, census metropolitan influenced zone, province or territory, and all Canada. The data in the tables are taken from personal income tax returns that were processed for the tax year two years prior to the year of publication.
- 2026 Edition (2024 tax year)
- 2025 Edition (2023 tax year)
- 2024 Edition (2022 tax year)
- 2023 Edition (2021 tax year)
- 2022 Edition (2020 tax year)
- 2021 Edition (2019 tax year)
- 2020 Edition (2018 tax year)
- 2019 Edition (2017 tax year)
- 2018 Edition (2016 tax year)
- 2017 Edition (2015 tax year)
- 2016 Edition (2014 tax year)
- 2015 Edition (2013 tax year)
- 2014 Edition (2012 tax year)
- 2013 Edition (2011 tax year)
- 2012 Edition (2010 tax year)
Select a data visualization dashboard:
- Individual Tax Statistics by Area Visualization
